This family includes over 1,000 genera and 13,000 species of plants, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The Rubiaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Telanthera strigosa is further classified into the order Gentianales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. The classification of Telanthera strigosa is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
